overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game showing a student character in wizard robes exploring the interior of a gothic castle. The character ascends stone stairwells and walks through corridors with medieval architecture, stained glass windows, and wooden floors, eventually reaching an upper level with a view of snowy mountains through a large arched window.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairwell ascending to upper corridor

events.description: character emerges from dark stairwell into bright sunlight streaming through large arched window at the landing

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs steadily upward from a dark passage toward a brightly lit landing

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls lining the narrow stairwell
worn wooden steps ascending between stone walls
gothic stone archway leading to the upper corridor
large window with bright sunlight streaming through at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone stairwell with wooden steps, transitioning from dimly lit stone walls to a bright landing illuminated by sunlight through a large arched window.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit castle corridor with stained glass windows

events.description: character turns left to follow the corridor alongside the wall with stained glass windows
character approaches and enters a darker arched doorway leading to a secondary stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden corridor floor, passing benches and observing the stained glass windows

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass window with intricate designs casting colored light
massive cylindrical stone pillar supporting the corridor ceiling
simple wooden bench positioned against the corridor wall
medieval-style wall-mounted lantern with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit corridor with wooden floors, passing stone columns and wooden benches. Sunlight streams through large stained glass windows on the left before the character turns into a darker archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding stone stairwell to upper clock tower

events.description: character emerges from dark stairs into brighter upper hall revealing large clock mechanism structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the winding stone staircase, rounding corners as the stairwell ascends to the clock tower level

entered.detail: tall narrow window with green-tinted glass in the stairwell wall
massive mechanical clock structure with gears and pendulum visible in the upper hall
ornate stone pillar supporting the vaulted ceiling of the upper level

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a secondary stone stairwell with narrow windows, emerging into a brighter upper level where a massive clock mechanism with gears and pendulums becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper clock tower walkway with mountain vista

events.description: character looks upward at the tall vaulted ceiling and intricate clock mechanism above
character approaches large arched window revealing snowy exterior mountain landscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway, pausing to look up at the architecture and then out at the snowy mountain view through the large window

entered.detail: tall gothic arched window framing a view of the exterior landscape
snow-covered mountain landscape visible through the window with distant buildings
ornate lantern suspended from the high ceiling by a chain

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper clock tower walkway, looking up at the vaulted ceiling and massive clock mechanism, then approaches a large arched window to view the snowy mountain landscape and distant castle buildings outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the gothic interior of a castle, ascending from dim stone stairwells into the airy heights of a sunlit clock tower. It begins as the character climbs a narrow stone stairwell with wooden steps, moving from shadow into a bright landing illuminated by a large arched window. As the character proceeds through a sunlit corridor with wooden floors and stained glass, the light shifts again when they turn into a darker archway to ascend a secondary set of stairs. The scene then opens into a bright upper level where a massive clock mechanism with gears and pendulums dominates the space. Finally, the camera follows the character along the tower walkway toward a large arched window, revealing a sweeping view of snowy mountains and distant castle buildings.
